MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-19-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances
Ryan A. Kent, Esq., Law Office of Ryan Kent, (415) 479-4356 ryan@ryankentlaw.com Attorney for Plaintiff Michael Hagele

JASON M. SKAGGS, Esq., SKAGGS FAUCETTE LLP 650/617-3226 jason@skaggsfaucette.com Attorney for Defendants MATTHEW KAHN and NEIL RIDEOUT

Mary Argyropoulous, CSR 775 415-597-5600 depos@behmke.com, Court Reporter

Hearing is held. ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT MATTHEW KAHN, NEIL RIDEOUT MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is taken under submission.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Mary Argyropoulous, CSR 775 415-597-5600 depos@behmke.com, Reported. (302/RBU)

**AFTER HEARING, AN ORDER DENYING DEFENDANTS' ANTI-SLAPP MOTION TO STRIKE IS ENTERED. **
